mentions.note: Up 16% on earnings; leveraging AI for location-based consumer targeting; benefiting from PC gaming refresh cycle and new RGB television technology. 200M consumer reach via social and associates; partnerships with OpenAI and Google.
Yields ominous 6.66% — historically indicates things getting tough out there; concerned about consumer.
Housing-market-sensitive, frozen until rates fall; potential upside if Fed cuts post-war resolution, but currently no bailout in sight.
Strong quarter reported; flying today along with Target; once-troubled retailer showing recovery signs.
Reports next week; risk of punishment for memory cost inflation passed to devices; semiconductor/PC/gaming memory costs critical.
